# Page Navigation Template

```html
<div class="page-navigation">
  <a href="./index.html" class="nav-link" title="返回目录">返回</a>
  <a href="1_cv.htm" class="nav-link">纲目</a>
  <a href="1_h.htm" class="nav-link">听抄</a>
  <a href="1_cx.htm" class="nav-link">晨兴</a>
  <a href="1_sg.htm" class="nav-link">诗歌</a>
  <a href="1_zs.htm" class="nav-link">职事</a>
</div>
```

可根据章节是否存在对应内容动态显示链接。
